generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important our alliances are for national security. Did you know that our partners in the Pacific region are now contributing 15% more to collective defense than they were just 5 years ago? Meanwhile, some politicians want to cut our commitments, leaving us vulnerable. We can't afford to weaken our alliances when threats are evolving faster than ever. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
